name: Zscaler - User accessing multiple high-risk categories
xql_query:
dataset = zscaler_nssweblog_raw
| filter act = "Block" and cs4 in ("Trojan", "Adware/Spyware", "Suspicious Destination")
| fields - _broker_device_id , _broker_device_name , _collection_timestamp , _final_reporting_device_ip , _raw_json , _raw_log , _collector_type , _reporting_device_name, _broker_ip_address, _id , _device_id 
| comp count_distinct(cs4) as distinct_categories by suser addrawdata = true as carry
| filter distinct_categories >= 2
| arrayexpand carry
| alter
    action = carry -> act,
    protocol = carry -> app,
    url_category = carry -> cat,
    destination_host = carry -> dhost,
    destination_ip = carry -> dst,
    source_ip = carry -> src,
    full_url = carry -> request,
    event_timestamp = carry -> rt,
    http_method = carry -> requestMethod,
    user_agent = carry -> requestClientApplication,
    device_hostname = carry -> deviceHostName,
    malware_category = carry -> cs4,
    threat_name = carry -> cs5,
    malware_class = carry -> cs6
| fields suser, distinct_categories, event_timestamp, action, source_ip, destination_ip, full_url, malware_category, threat_name, malware_class, device_hostname
description: Identify users who exhibit a pattern of risky browsing behavior in a short period
alert_name: Zscaler - User accessing multiple high-risk categories
